exercises.name: DB Goblet Squat
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, single DB at chest. Sit back, chest tall, as deep as possible. Stand squeezing glutes, repeat.
cues: "Elbows inside your knees — use them to push the knees out"
"Sit into it — chest stays tall the whole way down"
"Drive through your heels and squeeze your glutes at the top"
"Don't rush — own the bottom position"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or use BW only. Add heel lift if ankles are tight.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom. Or add a calf raise at the top.
Limit depth to pain-free range. Keep toes slightly turned out.

exercises.name: Fitband Standing Fly
exercises.movement: Facing away from inclined bench with bands attached to bench top, one handle each hand. Arms open wide, squeeze hands toward one another in front of chest. Control on the way back open wide. ⚠️ Set up as shown in video.
cues: "Slight bend in the elbows — hug a big tree"
"Squeeze the chest at the front — don't just touch hands"
"Control the return — slow is strong here"
"Tall posture — don't round the shoulders forward"

exercises.name: DB Forward Lunge Alt.
exercises.movement: DBs at sides, feet hip-width. Step forward, knee nearly to ground, torso upright. Return to start, switch legs, repeat.
cues: "Step out with intention — not a shuffle"
"Front shin stays vertical — don't let knee cave forward"
"Drive back through that front heel to stand"
"Tall spine — DBs hang straight down the whole time"

exercises.name: DB Triceps Press
exercises.movement: Hold one DB with both hands overhead, arms fully extended. Hinge at elbows, lower DB to 90° bend behind head, then press back overhead. Repeat.
cues: "Elbows point straight to the ceiling — don't let them flare"
"Only the forearms move — upper arms stay locked"
"Full lockout at the top — squeeze the triceps"
"Brace your core — don't arch the back"

exercises.name: KB Sumo Deadlift 2-Arm
exercises.movement: Feet wider than shoulders, toed out. Sit hips back with flat back. Pick up KBs by squeezing glutes to stand tall. Send hips back to return. Repeat.
cues: "Hinge, don't squat — push the hips back first"
"Flat back — brace before you pull"
"Drive your feet through the floor as you stand"
"Lock out at the top — hips forward, glutes squeezed"

exercises.name: TRX Low Fly
exercises.movement: Arms extended, feet under anchors. Keeping arms straight, pull handles apart toward hips. Slowly lower body back to start position.
cues: "Arms stay straight — this is a lat and rear delt move"
"Body in one line — plank the whole time"
"Pull to your hips, not just out to your sides"
"Slow return — don't just fall back to start"

exercises.name: TRX Chest Press
exercises.movement: Face away from anchor at 45°. Hands under shoulders, straps on top of arms. Lower controlled, press away from floor back to start. Repeat.
cues: "Body stays in a perfect plank — hips don't sag"
"Elbows at 45° — don't let them flare wide"
"Lower controlled — the descent is half the workout"
"Push the floor away — full arm extension at top"

exercises.name: TRX Oblique Crunch
exercises.movement: Standing sideways, hold TRX with both hands overhead, slight bend in elbows. Lower hips away from TRX, stand back up tall. Repeat both sides.
cues: "Think side bend, not rotation — keep hips square"
"Lower hips straight down — no swinging"
"Pull yourself back up with your obliques, not your arms"
"Control both directions — slow is more effective"

exercises.name: DB Devils Press 1 arm Alt.
exercises.movement: Holding 1 DB at side. Place DB on the ground under shoulder & step/jump back to plank. Lower to floor & chest to DB. Lift chest & step/jump back to standing, DB between feet. In one continuous movement, finishing with DB pressed out overhead. Repeat and switch hands.
cues: "One fluid motion — burpee plus snatch in a single rep"
"Keep that DB close on the way up — zip the jacket"
"Power comes from the hips, not the arm"
"Lockout overhead — bicep by your ear before you reset"

modifications.text: Step the burpee instead of jumping. Lighter DB. Or break into separate movements: burpee → deadlift → press.
Heavier DB. Add a push-up at the bottom of every rep.
Skip the overhead — finish at shoulder height. Or sub a DB clean instead.

exercises.name: DB Drop Step Squat 2arm Alt.
exercises.movement: Holding DBs in the front rack position, open the hips to step into a sumo position. The body turns 90 degrees with the step. Squat. Stand back up with feet together and repeat on the other side.
cues: "Open the hip on the step — it's a 90° turn, not a sidestep"
"Elbows up in the rack — don't let them drop on the squat"
"Sit between your feet — sumo stance, knees track over toes"
"Stand fully and bring feet together before the next rep"

modifications.text: Goblet hold with one DB. Or step into sumo without the squat first to learn the pattern.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom of each squat. Heavier DBs.
Reduce squat depth. Smaller drop step — keep stance narrower than full sumo.

exercises.name: V-up to Jump
exercises.movement: Lie on back, raise straight legs and arms to touch. Lower, stand and jump straight up. Land softly, lie back down. Repeat.
cues: "V-up the abs — fingers reach for toes at the top"
"Use momentum — roll up to standing"
"Explode through the floor on the jump"
"Land soft, knees bent — no slamming down"

modifications.text: Crunch instead of full V-up. Stand without jumping. Or break into separate moves: V-up → roll to plank → stand.
Tuck jump at the top instead of straight jump. Hold a DB during V-up.
Bent-knee crunch instead of V-up. Skip the jump — stand and reach up only.

exercises.name: KB 2 Hand Stepping Clean
exercises.movement: Start in a 1.5 stance with KB hanging at calf height. Step together as you pull the KB to chest height with both hands. Slowly lower, step back with the other foot and repeat.
cues: "Step and pull together — one motion, not two"
"Drive through the back foot as you bring it in"
"KB stays close to your body — don't swing it out"
"Slow lower — control the descent back to start"

modifications.text: Lighter KB. Or skip the step — feet stay planted in 1.5 stance throughout.
Heavier KB. Pause 1 second at chest height before lowering.
Lighter KB. Reduce range — only pull to ribcage height. Hinge less aggressively.

exercises.name: KB 2 Hand Curtsy Lunge to Lateral Lunge
exercises.movement: Holding KBs by side. Step behind and across the midline into a curtsy lunge, then using the same stepping leg, step back to center, then into a lateral lunge. Repeat on same leg for reps then switch legs.
cues: "Same leg does both lunges — back and across, then out to the side"
"Sit into the working hip on the lateral lunge"
"Standing leg stays anchored — chest tall throughout"
"Drive back to center each time — full reset between"

modifications.text: BW only. Reduce depth on both lunges. Hold rack with one hand for balance.
Pause at the bottom of each lunge. Heavier KBs.
Reduce depth. Skip the curtsy and just do lateral lunges.

exercises.name: TRX Push Up Fly Combination
exercises.movement: Hold TRX handles in front at chest level with straight arms, slight forward lean. Lower body down by extending one straight arm outwards and bending the other arm to 90°. Drive both handles back to shoulder width to return to start position. Switch sides and repeat.
cues: "One arm flies, one arm presses — feel both at the same time"
"Body stays in a perfect plank — no rotation, no sag"
"Drive both handles back together to start — that's the work"
"Slow on the lower — control the asymmetric load"

modifications.text: Walk feet back to reduce body angle. Or do a regular TRX push-up without the fly.
Walk feet forward (more horizontal = more load). Add a 2-second hold at the bottom.
Reduce fly arm range. Keep movement smaller and more controlled.

exercises.name: Side Lunge w/ Hop
exercises.movement: Complete a side lunge. As you drive up to stand, push off feet for a slight hop and side shuffle to complete a side lunge on the opposite side. Continue to alternate.
cues: "Sit into the working hip — chest tall, butt back"
"Drive through that working heel to launch into the hop"
"Land soft and absorb — reset before the next lunge"
"Knees track over toes — don't let them cave in"

modifications.text: Skip the hop — just step side to side. Reduce lunge depth.
Add a deeper hop or hold a DB at chest. Pause at the bottom of each lunge.
Step instead of hop. Reduce depth — work pain-free range.

exercises.name: DB Plank Push Up w/ Lateral Shift
exercises.movement: Start in a high plank with DB on left side of body. Go down to ground on each elbow, press back up one hand at a time back to high plank. Reach under body with right hand, grabbing and pulling DB to right side. Repeat with left arm and then back from beginning.
cues: "Hips stay square — resist the rotation when you reach"
"One movement at a time — plank to elbows, elbows to plank, then drag"
"Reach FAR under your body to grab the DB — full range"
"Feet wide for stability — narrow stance makes the rotation hard"

modifications.text: Drop knees for the elbow lower. Or skip the elbow drop and just do the lateral DB drag.
Heavier DB. Add a push-up between drags. Slower tempo on the elbow lower.
Use push-up handles. Or stay on elbows the whole time and just drag the DB.

exercises.name: DB RDL To Power Clean
exercises.movement: Stand feet shoulder width apart, DB in each hand in front of shins. Hinge at hips and complete RDL. Then at the top, drive feet into the floor and thrust hips forward, bringing DBs just above shoulders. Bring DBs back to floor, repeat combo.
cues: "Hinge first — feel the hamstring stretch before you reverse"
"Power comes from the hips — explode through the floor"
"DBs stay close to your body — zip the jacket on the way up"
"Catch soft on the rack — elbows up and around the DBs"

modifications.text: Lighter DBs. Or split into separate movements — RDL first, then a separate clean.
Heavier DBs. Add a press at the top of each clean.
Light DBs. Reduce range — only pull to mid-shin. Focus on the hinge pattern.

exercises.name: KB Lateral Shift w/ Hand Switch
exercises.movement: Standing tall, feet wide, KB in left hand. Shift weight to right and take KB toward the ground at inside right ankle. As you stand, switch KB to right hand at the top and switch sides. Continue to alternate.
cues: "Sit INTO the working hip — straight leg stays long"
"KB tracks down the inside of the working ankle"
"Switch hands at the TOP — full standing lockout between"
"Chest up — don't fold over the KB"

modifications.text: Lighter KB. Reduce depth — only shift halfway down.
Heavier KB. Pause 1 second at the bottom of each shift.
Reduce depth significantly. Work pain-free range only.

exercises.name: Ball Ground to Shoulder alt.
exercises.movement: Stand with MB in front of you. Squat to grab ball, back flat. Stand and bring ball to shoulder. Roll it over. Repeat other side.
cues: "Squat to pick up — back flat, chest tall, lift with the legs"
"Drive through the hips — let the hip explosion send the ball up"
"Roll the ball over the shoulder — don't muscle it with the arms"
"Reset stance every rep — feet under hips before the next pickup"

modifications.text: Lighter ball. Bring to chest height instead of shoulder. Reduce squat depth.
Heavier ball. Add a press overhead at the top of each rep.
Lighter ball. Reduce squat depth and ensure flat back on every pickup.

exercises.name: TRX Standing Rollout
exercises.movement: Hold TRX handles in front at chest level with straight arms, slight forward lean. Tighten abs, allow hands to reach forward as deep as comfortable. Pull hands back to chest level.
cues: "Arms stay STRAIGHT the whole time — no bending the elbows"
"Body is one piece — fall forward as a plank"
"Only go as far as you can pull yourself back"
"Pull back with your CORE, not your shoulders"

modifications.text: Walk feet back — more upright body angle = less load. Smaller reach forward.
Walk feet forward — more horizontal = more load. Slower 3-second reach forward.
Very small range. Brace hard before each rep. Stop if you feel any back strain.

exercises.name: Bulgarian Offset Weight Split Squat
exercises.movement: DB held in front rack position on one side with same leg up on bench, keep torso upright and complete a Bulgarian Split Squat. Stand and repeat. Complete on other side too.
cues: "Offset load — DB on the SAME side as the working leg makes it spicier"
"Torso stays tall — no lean forward to make it easier"
"Drop straight down — back knee tracks toward the floor"
"Drive through the front heel to stand"

modifications.text: BW only or lighter DB. Reduce depth. Hold rack with free hand for balance.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom. Heavier DB. Slower 3-second lower.
Reduce depth significantly. Keep front shin more vertical. BW only.

exercises.name: DB Donkey Kicks on Bench
exercises.movement: In tabletop position, raise one leg directly off the bench with DB in crook of knee. Lower with control, complete reps, then switch sides.
cues: "Pinch the DB in the back of the knee — don't drop it"
"Drive the heel to the ceiling — squeeze the glute hard at the top"
"Hips stay square — no rotation when you kick up"
"Slow on the lower — control the descent"

modifications.text: BW only — no DB. Reduce range — kick up to hip height only.
Heavier DB. Add a pulse at the top. Slow 3-second lower.
BW only. Smaller range — don't arch the back to gain height.

exercises.name: Push Up
exercises.movement: Start in high plank position, body in a straight line. Slowly lower chest close to floor, push the floor away to come back up.
cues: "Body in one line — head to heels, no sagging hips, no piked butt"
"Elbows at 45° — not flared out to the sides"
"Chest to the floor — full range, full chest contact at the bottom"
"Push the FLOOR away — full lockout at the top"

modifications.text: Hands on bench for incline push-up. Or drop to knees on the floor.
Feet elevated on bench. Slow 3-second lower. Add a clap at the top.
Push-up handles or on fists. Or do them on a bench at incline.

exercises.name: DB Tate Press
exercises.movement: Lie on bench with DB in each hand, arms fully extended. Bend at and push elbows out, lowering DBs in towards chest. Press back up to start and repeat.
cues: "Elbows flare OUT — opposite of a regular press"
"DBs come down toward your sternum — palms face your feet"
"Full lockout at the top — squeeze the triceps"
"Control the lower — don't crash the DBs on your chest"

modifications.text: Lighter DBs. Reduce range — only lower halfway.
Slow 3-second lower. Heavier DBs. Pause at the bottom.
Very light DBs. Small range only. Skip if any sharp pain.

exercises.name: KB SL RDL
exercises.movement: Stand on R leg, holding onto KB in L Hand. Reach L heel to rear wall, straight line from ankle to ear. Squeeze R glute to stand, switch legs, repeat.
cues: "Ankle to ear — body forms one straight line at the bottom"
"Hips stay SQUARE — don't let the back hip open up"
"KB stays close to the standing leg — it tracks down your shin"
"Drive the standing heel into the floor to stand"

modifications.text: Kickstand stance — toe of back foot lightly grazes floor for balance. Lighter KB.
Heavier KB. Pause 2 seconds at the bottom. Slow 3-second lower.
Small range only — don't push for depth. Hold rack with free hand for balance.

exercises.name: KB Swing
exercises.movement: KB on floor slightly in front of you, feet shoulder width. Hips slide back, grab KB handle, hike back between legs. Drive hips forward and stand tall, let bell float, then drive back between legs.
cues: "Hips are the engine — NOT your arms"
"Hike the KB high between your legs — get it past your hips"
"Snap to standing — full hip extension, glutes squeezed, abs tight"
"Let the bell float — don't muscle it up with your shoulders"

modifications.text: Lighter KB. Lower swing height — chest level only. Or sub a KB deadlift to learn the hinge.
Heavier KB. American swing (overhead). Add a 1-sec pause at the top.
Lighter KB. Smaller range. Sub deadlifts if any back discomfort.

exercises.name: TRX Low Row
exercises.movement: Grab the handles with both hands and lean backwards. With your palms facing up towards ceiling, pull yourself up to the handles. The handles should end up right under your chest. Release yourself back out.
cues: "Palms up — supinated grip hits the biceps and lower lats"
"Body stays in one line — no hip sag, no piked butt"
"Pull elbows down and back — handles land under your ribs"
"Slow release — earn the negative"

modifications.text: Walk feet back — more upright = less load. Bend knees.
Walk feet forward — more horizontal = more load. Pause 2 sec at top.
Reduce range. Don't pull as deep — stop when elbows reach 90°.

exercises.name: Ball Slam
exercises.movement: Start with Med Ball between feet. Pick up in a squat and slam by sending hips to back wall between big toes.
cues: "Squat to pick up — back flat, chest tall"
"Load the hips and slam with intent — full body explosion"
"Slam between your big toes — not in front, not to the side"
"Retrieve and reset — don't chase the bounce"

modifications.text: Lighter ball. Less aggressive slam — controlled drop instead.
Heavier ball. Add a jump at the top before the slam.
Lighter ball. Reduce squat depth. Focus on flat back on pickup.

exercises.name: DB 1arm Snatch w/ Foot on Bench
exercises.movement: Stand feet shoulder width apart, DB in right hand in front of shins. Drive feet into the floor and thrust hips forward, bringing DB overhead while simultaneously bringing the opposite foot to tap the bench top. Bring DB and foot back to floor, repeat second side.
cues: "Power from the hips — the snatch is a hip drive, not an arm pull"
"DB and opposite foot move together — one coordinated rep"
"DB stays close to the body on the way up — zip the jacket"
"Lockout overhead — bicep by your ear, full extension"

modifications.text: Lighter DB. Skip the bench tap — keep both feet down. Or break into a clean instead of full snatch.
Heavier DB. Pause overhead with the foot on the bench before resetting.
Finish at shoulder height — no overhead. Lighter DB, controlled tempo.

exercises.name: DB Bridge and Press on bench
exercises.movement: Lie on back on bench, lift hips into bridge position, press DBs to sky and return under control.
cues: "Hold the bridge HIGH the whole set — glutes stay switched on"
"Press the DBs straight up over the chest — not toward the face"
"Elbows down to ribs on the lower — full range"
"Two muscle groups at once — don't let the hips drop to rest"

modifications.text: Lighter DBs. Or hold the bridge static and just press — lower hips between presses if needed.
Heavier DBs. Single-arm press (alternate). Slow 3-second lower.
Reduce press range. Keep elbows closer to 45°. Lighter load.

exercises.name: DB SL Hip Thrust
exercises.movement: Upper back on bench or floor. Legs bent. Lift one leg. Drive the other heel into the ground and squeeze butt to lift hips as high as possible. Lower controlled. Repeat alternating legs.
cues: "Drive through the HEEL of the working leg — not the toe"
"Squeeze the glute hard at the top — full hip extension"
"Hips stay LEVEL — don't let the lifted-leg side drop"
"Control the lower — 2 seconds down, no dropping"

modifications.text: Both feet down (double-leg thrust). No DB — bodyweight only.
Heavier DB on the hip. Pause 2 seconds at the top of each rep.
Both feet down. Smaller range — focus on the glute squeeze, not height.

exercises.name: KB Counterbalance Lateral Lunge
exercises.movement: Start holding KB in goblet position. As you step to the side for a lateral lunge, push the KB out straight in front of the chest. Bring back to goblet and complete the combo on the other side.
cues: "KB presses out as you lunge down — it counterbalances you"
"Sit INTO the working hip — straight leg stays long"
"Chest tall — the KB out front helps you stay upright"
"Drive through the working heel to return to goblet"

modifications.text: Lighter KB. Keep KB in goblet — skip the press-out. Reduce lunge depth.
Heavier KB. Pause at the bottom with the KB pressed out.
Reduce depth. Keep the working shin more vertical. Lighter KB.

exercises.name: Ball Chest Slam
exercises.movement: Hinge hips back, chest pass the ball into the floor, retrieve, repeat.
cues: "Hinge the hips back to load — then explode the chest pass"
"Full power through the chest — drive the ball into the floor"
"Brace the core on every slam — don't round the back"
"Retrieve and reset — controlled pickup before the next rep"

modifications.text: Lighter ball. Smaller slam — controlled push instead of full power.
Heavier ball. More explosive — add a small jump on the retrieve.
Reduce force. Controlled push rather than a hard slam. Lighter ball.

exercises.name: DB Box Squat Overhead Press
exercises.movement: Holding DB in front rack position, standing feet hip width apart at end of bench, control body during squat to sit on bench, stand up and press DBs overhead. Lower DBs, then sit. Repeat.
cues: "Control the descent to the bench — don't crash down onto it"
"Tap and go — touch the bench, don't fully relax onto it"
"Drive up first, then press — legs and shoulders in sequence"
"Lockout overhead — biceps by your ears, ribs down"

modifications.text: Lighter DBs. Split into a box squat and a separate press. Sit fully on the bench between reps.
Heavier DBs. Pause on the bench for 2 seconds before standing.
Press to shoulder height only, or skip the press — just box squat.

exercises.name: DB Offset Front Rack Lateral Lunge
exercises.movement: Holding DB front rack position on left side, complete a lateral lunge to the right side. When you switch sides, the DB is held front rack position on the opposite side — complete lateral lunge.
cues: "Offset load — the single DB makes your core fight the tilt"
"Sit INTO the lunging hip — straight leg stays long"
"Elbow stays high in the rack — don't let the DB drag you down"
"Chest tall — push through the working heel to return"

modifications.text: Lighter DB or BW only. Reduce lunge depth. Hold rack with free hand for balance.
Heavier DB. Pause 2 seconds at the bottom of each lunge.
Reduce depth. Keep the working shin more vertical. Lighter load.

exercises.name: DB Chest Fly
exercises.movement: Lie flat on bench, feet on the floor, holding the weights with slight bend in the elbows above the chest. Open the arms as though you were hugging the ceiling. Return to start position.
cues: "Slight bend in the elbows — lock that angle and hold it"
"Hug a big tree — wide arc, not a press"
"Feel the stretch across the chest at the bottom"
"Squeeze the chest to bring the DBs back together"

modifications.text: Lighter DBs. Reduce the range — don't lower as deep.
Slow 3-second lower. Pause at the bottom stretch. Heavier DBs.
Reduce range significantly — stop well before full stretch. Light DBs.

exercises.name: V-Up to Jump
exercises.movement: Lie on back, raise straight legs and arms to touch. Lower, stand and jump straight up. Land softly, lie back down. Repeat.
cues: "V-up the abs — fingers reach for toes at the top"
"Use momentum — roll up to standing"
"Explode through the floor on the jump"
"Land soft, knees bent — no slamming down"

modifications.text: Crunch instead of full V-up. Stand without jumping. Or break into separate moves: V-up → roll to plank → stand.
Tuck jump at the top instead of straight jump. Hold a DB during the V-up.
Bent-knee crunch instead of V-up. Skip the jump — stand and reach up only.

exercises.name: KB Sumo Deadlift 2arm
exercises.movement: Feet wider than shoulders, toed out. Sit hips back with flat back. Pick up the weights by squeezing the butt. Stand tall, send hips back, return to starting position.
cues: "Hinge, don't squat — push the hips back first"
"Flat back — brace your core before you pull"
"Drive the feet through the floor to stand"
"Lock out at the top — hips forward, glutes squeezed"

modifications.text: Lighter KBs or a single KB held with both hands. Reduce range of motion.
Pause 1 second at the bottom before pulling. Heavier KBs.
Keep the range shallow — only hinge to mid-shin. Brace harder before pulling.

exercises.name: DB Thruster 1arm Alt.
exercises.movement: Hold DB in front rack position. Sit back into a squat, chest tall. Drive heels down and thrust hips forward to standing and drive the weight to the ceiling. Return to start.
cues: "Elbow stays HIGH in the rack — don't let it drop on the squat"
"Use the legs — the press is powered from the hips, not the arm"
"One fluid motion — stand and press in the same beat"
"Lockout overhead — bicep by your ear, ribs down"

modifications.text: Lighter DB. Or split into squat then press as two movements. Reduce squat depth.
Heavier DB. Pause 1 sec at the bottom of each squat before driving up.
Press to shoulder height only — no overhead. Lighter DB.

exercises.name: DB Bent Over Fly
exercises.movement: Stand tall, then hinge back. Hold DBs with palms facing. Squeeze shoulder blades and raise DBs to shoulder level and lower. Repeat.
cues: "Hinge first — chest down, flat back, hold that position"
"Lead with the elbows — not the hands"
"Squeeze the shoulder blades together at the top"
"Slow lower — control the negative"

modifications.text: Lighter DBs. Rest chest on a high bench for support and to take the back out.
Slow 3-second lower. Pause 1 sec at the top. Heavier DBs.
Reduce hinge depth — keep torso more upright. Or do it seated on the end of the bench.

exercises.name: Fitband Tricep Extension
exercises.movement: Hands start overhead. Bend at the elbow as hands come down behind the head. Press hands away, extending arms back to start, while maintaining a strong core position.
cues: "Elbows point straight to the ceiling — pin them, don't flare"
"Only the forearms move — upper arms stay locked"
"Full lockout at the top — squeeze the triceps"
"Brace the core — don't arch the back to gain leverage"

modifications.text: Step closer to the anchor to reduce band tension. Or grip the band shorter.
Step further from anchor. Slow 3-second lower. Pause at the bottom stretch.
Reduce range — only lower halfway behind the head. Less band tension.

exercises.name: TRX Lat Pull Seated
exercises.movement: Adjust handles to highest position. Sit on the floor with your legs bent at the knee or straight. Bring your ribs to your hips and pull your body up toward the anchor point using the straps. Lower controlled. Repeat.
cues: "Pull with the LATS — feel the shoulder blades drop and pull down"
"Ribs to hips — engage the core to come up as one piece"
"Drive elbows DOWN — not back like a row"
"Slow lower — earn the negative on every rep"

modifications.text: Knees bent and feet flat to assist. Or scoot closer to anchor for less load.
Legs straight. Scoot further from anchor. Pause 2 sec at the top.
Reduce range. Smaller pull height — don't force through any pinch.

exercises.name: KB Swing w/ Lateral Step
exercises.movement: KB Swing while taking a lateral step, alternating sides from right to left.
cues: "Step out as the KB swings UP — timing makes the move flow"
"Land balanced before the next hinge — don't rush the step"
"Hips power the swing — not the arms"
"Stay athletic — soft knees, chest tall through the float"

modifications.text: Lighter KB. Skip the step — stay planted, just swing.
Heavier KB. Larger lateral step for more travel. Quicker tempo.
Lighter KB. Smaller range — chest-height swings only.

exercises.name: Squat to Split Jump
exercises.movement: Complete a squat, then a split jump lunge on each side and back to start. Continue to repeat.
cues: "Squat first — full depth, full standup before the split jump"
"Switch FULLY in the air — not on the ground"
"Land soft into the lunge — back knee almost grazes the floor"
"Reset to squat between split jumps — that's one rep"

modifications.text: Step into the lunges instead of jumping. Reduce squat depth.
Add height to the squat jump. Hold DBs at sides. Faster tempo.
Step switch instead of jumping. Reduce squat depth.

exercises.name: DB Forward alt. Lunge
exercises.movement: Begin feet hip width holding DBs at sides. Step forward, knee almost to ground, torso upright. Return, switch legs, repeat.
cues: "Step out with intention — not a shuffle"
"Front shin stays vertical — don't let the knee cave forward"
"Drive back through that front heel to stand"
"Tall spine — DBs hang straight down the whole time"

modifications.text: BW only or reduce step length. Hold rack or bench for balance.
Heavier DBs. Pause 1 sec at the bottom. Slow descent.
Reduce forward step distance and depth. Keep front shin more vertical.

exercises.name: DB Counterbalance Squat
exercises.movement: Start holding DB at chest. As you squat down, press the DB out in front of your body, keeping it at chest height. As you stand back up, pull the DB back to chest.
cues: "DB presses OUT as you squat DOWN — it counterbalances you"
"Use the press to sit deeper — chest stays tall"
"Pull DB back to chest as you stand — one fluid combo"
"Drive through both heels to stand"

modifications.text: Lighter DB. Reduce squat depth. Or keep DB at chest the whole time — skip the press out.
Pause 2 sec at the bottom with DB pressed out. Heavier DB.
Limit depth to pain-free range. Lighter DB.

exercises.name: Fitband Rotational Row to Press
exercises.movement: Standing at side of bench, facing the bench, arm furthest from Fitband. Pull and row the band away from the anchor point, switch hands and rotate at the hips, press arm up to fully extend.
cues: "Row first — pull the elbow back, then rotate"
"Power comes from the hips on the rotation — not just the arms"
"Hand switches at the chest — clean transition"
"Press straight up — full lockout overhead"

modifications.text: Step closer to anchor for less band tension. Smaller rotation range.
Step further from anchor. Pause at the top of each press. Slow tempo.
Press to shoulder height — no overhead. Reduce range.

exercises.name: KB Push Press
exercises.movement: Hold KB in front rack position. Dip and drive with the legs, using the momentum to help press the KBs toward the ceiling, arms lock at the top. Bend the knees as you bring the weights back to front rack.
cues: "Short DIP — quarter squat only, not a full squat"
"Drive through the legs FIRST, then press — let the legs power it"
"Full lockout overhead — biceps by your ears"
"Soft catch back in the rack — bend the knees to absorb"

modifications.text: Lighter KBs. Use a single KB held with both hands. Bigger dip if more leg drive is needed.
Heavier KBs. Strict press (no dip) for top-end strength.
Press to forehead height only. Lighter KBs. Use the dip to take pressure off the shoulder.

exercises.name: TRX Power Pull
exercises.movement: Hold handle in 1 hand with arm straight. Feet hip width. Pull hand to armpit, staying square to anchor. Lower to starting position.
cues: "Stay square to the anchor — resist the rotation"
"Elbow drives back behind you — pull to the armpit, not the chest"
"Full extension on the way down — earn the negative"
"Brace the core hard — this is anti-rotation as much as it's a pull"

modifications.text: Walk feet back to reduce body angle. Smaller pull range.
Walk feet forward. Pause 2 sec at the top of each pull.
Limit range — keep elbow below shoulder height.

exercises.name: Ball SL Crunch Standing
exercises.movement: Start with the ball at chest and press overhead. Pull down to meet the knee as you raise your foot off the floor, driving the knee up to meet the ball to complete a "standing crunch." Repeat on the other side.
cues: "Press tall overhead — full extension before the crunch"
"Drive the knee UP to meet the ball — meet in the middle"
"Crunch the abs hard at the top — that's the work"
"Stay tall on the standing leg — soft knee, balanced"

modifications.text: Lighter ball or no ball — hands overhead, knee to elbow. Hold rack with free hand for balance.
Heavier ball. Pause 1 sec with the knee up. Slow tempo.
Hold rack with one hand. Or do it seated on the bench with leg lifts.

exercises.name: DB Step Up alt.
exercises.movement: Hold a DB in each hand. Step up onto the box with one leg, stand all the way tall, then step down with the same leg. Alternate legs each rep.
cues: "Drive through the WHOLE foot on the box — push the floor away"
"Stand all the way tall at the top — don't cut the rep short"
"Control the step down — lower, don't drop and crash"
"Knee tracks over the toes — don't let it cave in"

modifications.text: Lighter DBs or bodyweight. Lower the box. Hold the rack for balance.
Heavier DBs. Higher box. Pause 1 sec balanced at the top before stepping down.
Lower the box to reduce knee bend. Bodyweight only. Drive through the heel and avoid any pain range.

exercises.name: KB Thruster
exercises.movement: Hold the KB in the front rack position. Sit back into a squat, chest tall. Drive the heels down and thrust the hips forward to standing, driving the weight to the ceiling. Return to the rack and repeat.
cues: "Elbow stays HIGH in the rack — don't let it drop in the squat"
"Legs power the press — one drive from the floor up"
"Stand and press in the SAME beat — one fluid motion"
"Lock out overhead — bicep by your ear, ribs down"

modifications.text: Lighter KB, or hold one KB in both hands. Split into a squat then a press. Reduce squat depth.
Heavier KB. Pause 1 sec at the bottom of the squat before driving up.
Press to shoulder height only — no overhead. Lighter KB.

exercises.name: DB Plank Row
exercises.movement: In a high plank with a hand on each DB, brace the core and pull one DB up to the ribs. Lower it back to the plank with control, then switch sides.
cues: "Squeeze glutes and brace — hips stay LEVEL, no rotation"
"Pull the DB to the RIBS — elbow drives back, not out"
"Wide feet for a stable base — build a tripod"
"Slow and controlled — don't fling the weight up"

modifications.text: Lighter DBs. Widen the feet, or drop to the knees. Row without the DB to groove the pattern.
Heavier DBs. Narrow the feet. Pause 1 sec at the top of each row.
Use hex DBs or push-up handles to keep the wrists neutral. Lighter load.

exercises.name: BW Push Up
exercises.movement: Feet on the floor, back flat, hands under the shoulders. Lower the chest to the floor and press back up to the start. Elevate the hands on a bench if needed.
cues: "Body is one straight line — squeeze glutes and brace the core"
"Elbows at 45° — don't flare them straight out to the sides"
"Chest leads all the way down — earn the full range"
"Press the floor away and lock out tall at the top"

modifications.text: Elevate the hands on a bench or rack. Or drop to the knees. Reduce the range.
Elevate the feet. Slow 3-second lower. Pause 1 sec at the bottom.
Use push-up handles or fists to keep the wrists neutral. Elevate the hands.

exercises.name: Fitband Triceps Extensions
exercises.movement: Hands start overhead. Bend at the elbow as the hands come down behind the head. Press the hands away, extending the arms back to start, while maintaining a strong core position.
cues: "Elbows point straight to the ceiling — pin them, don't flare"
"Only the forearms move — upper arms stay locked"
"Full lockout at the top — squeeze the triceps"
"Brace the core — don't arch the back to gain leverage"

modifications.text: Step closer to the anchor to reduce band tension. Or grip the band shorter.
Step further from the anchor. Slow 3-second lower. Pause at the bottom stretch.
Reduce range — only lower halfway behind the head. Less band tension.

exercises.name: Ball Power Slam w/ Hop
exercises.movement: Start with the med ball between the feet. Pick it up in a squat and hop up as you raise it overhead, then slam it down by sending the hips back, driving the ball between the big toes.
cues: "Explode UP on the hop — fully extend hips, knees and ankles"
"Reach TALL overhead before the slam — load the whole body"
"Hips go BACK on the slam — hinge, don't just bend the arms"
"Catch the bounce and reset fast — keep the rhythm"

modifications.text: Lighter ball. Skip the hop — stay grounded and slam. Smaller overhead reach.
Heavier ball. Higher hop. Faster cycle rate for conditioning.
Lighter ball. Hinge from the hips with a flat back. Smaller range and no hop.

exercises.name: DB SL Deadlift Row Alt.
exercises.movement: Stand on one foot, DBs in hands. Hinge at the hips and push them back, back flat, soft bend in the standing knee. At the bottom, row the weights to your hips, then lower. Extend the arms, stand tall, and switch sides.
cues: "Hinge from the hips — push them back, don't squat down"
"Square your hips to the floor — don't let the lifted side open up"
"Row to the hip, elbow tight — squeeze the back at the top"
"Stay balanced — own the standing leg before you switch"

modifications.text: Tap the back toe down for balance instead of staying fully single-leg.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom of the hinge before rowing.
Reduce the hinge depth and keep the back flat — never round to reach lower.

exercises.name: DB Devils Press
exercises.movement: Holding DBs at your sides, set them on the floor under your shoulders and step or jump back to a plank. Lower your chest to the floor, then step or jump the feet back in. In one continuous movement, swing the DBs between your feet and snatch them overhead to lockout.
cues: "Chest all the way to the floor — full rep every time"
"Use your hips — this is a swing into a snatch, not a curl"
"Punch the dumbbells straight overhead and stand tall"
"Find a steady rhythm — pace it so you don't gas out"

modifications.text: Step back and in instead of jumping, and press the DBs up instead of snatching.
Move continuously with heavier DBs for an unbroken set.
Press to a comfortable height instead of a full overhead lockout.

exercises.name: Leg Raises on bench
exercises.movement: Lie flat on the bench, hands under your glutes if needed. Start with both legs straight up. Lower them together with control until just before they tap the floor, then raise back to the top and repeat.
cues: "Press your low back into the bench the whole time"
"Control the lower — that's where the work is"
"Keep the legs long — only a soft bend in the knees"
"Stop the lower before your back arches off the bench"

modifications.text: Bend the knees to 90° to shorten the lever.
Pause 2 seconds with the legs just off the floor each rep.
Reduce the range — keep the legs higher and never let the back arch.

exercises.name: BW Popcorn Squat
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, drop into a squat and add a small jump, staying down in the lower range. Keep holding the low squat stance and 'pop' continuously without standing all the way up.
cues: "Stay low — live in the bottom of the squat"
"Small, springy jumps — quick off the floor"
"Chest tall, weight in your heels"
"Soft landings — knees track over your toes"

modifications.text: Skip the jump — pulse in the bottom of the squat instead.
Drop lower or hold the position longer between pops.
Limit depth to a pain-free range and remove the jump.

exercises.name: KB Lateral Lunge Alt.
exercises.movement: Stand feet hip-width with a KB at your chest. Step one leg out to the side and sit back into that hip and heel, keeping the other leg straight. Press through the foot to return to standing, alternating sides.
cues: "Sit back into the hip — push the glute behind you"
"Working knee tracks over the toes, other leg stays long"
"Chest tall — don't fold over the bell"
"Drive through the whole foot to stand"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or hold the KB at the chest with no added load.
Pause at the bottom or hold the bell lower in a goblet position.
Limit depth and keep the knee tracking behind the toes.

exercises.name: TRX Pike
exercises.movement: High plank with feet in the TRX straps, hands under shoulders. Keeping the legs straight, drive your hips up toward the ceiling as far as possible, then lower back to a strong plank with control.
cues: "Hips to the ceiling — pike up, don't just tuck"
"Push the floor away — strong shoulders"
"Legs long — squeeze the quads"
"Control the lower — don't sag the hips at the bottom"

modifications.text: Do a TRX knee tuck instead of a straight-leg pike.
Slow the tempo — 3 seconds up, 3 seconds down.
Substitute a floor-based pike with feet on a slider.

exercises.name: DB Neutral Grip Row on Bench
exercises.movement: Place one knee and hand on the bench, back flat, other foot on the floor. DB in the free hand with a neutral grip. Pull the DB from directly under your shoulder up toward your armpit, then lower with control. Complete reps, then switch sides.
cues: "Flat back — body parallel to the floor"
"Pull to the hip pocket, elbow tight to your side"
"Squeeze the shoulder blade at the top"
"Don't twist — keep both hips square to the bench"

modifications.text: Lighten the DB and reduce range to keep the back flat.
Pause 1–2 seconds at the top of each row.
Keep the supported position and avoid rounding to reach lower.

exercises.name: DB 1arm Crossbody Reverse Lunge
exercises.movement: DB in one hand. Step back into a reverse lunge and reach the DB across your body toward the front foot's ankle. As you stand, return the DB to your side. Complete reps on one side, then switch.
cues: "Reach across the body — feel the stretch through the hip"
"Front knee over the ankle, back knee drops straight down"
"Drive through the front heel to stand"
"Stay tall through the spine as you reach"

modifications.text: Reach toward the knee instead of the ankle, or use no weight.
Slow the descent or increase the DB load.
Shorten the lunge and limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: Superman on Bench
exercises.movement: Lie face-down on the bench with arms reaching overhead and legs extended. Contract through the back and glutes to raise the arms and legs a few inches, hold at the top 3–5 seconds, then lower with control and repeat.
cues: "Lengthen first — reach long through fingers and toes"
"Lift from the back and glutes, not by cranking the neck"
"Hold the top — squeeze for the full count"
"Keep the gaze down to keep the neck neutral"

modifications.text: Lift arms and legs separately instead of together.
Extend the hold or add a light DB in each hand.
Reduce lift height — keep it small and pain-free.

exercises.name: Ball Overhead Slam to Squat Jump
exercises.movement: Lift the med ball overhead and slam it to the floor. Before picking it up to slam again, perform a squat jump. Repeat the slam-then-jump sequence.
cues: "Full overhead reach — load the slam from the hips"
"Slam through the ball, hinge as it hits the floor"
"Explode straight up on the squat jump"
"Soft landing — absorb through the hips and knees"

modifications.text: Remove the jump — stand up out of the squat instead.
Use a heavier ball and move continuously.
Replace the squat jump with a controlled bodyweight squat.

exercises.name: Ball Adductor Squeeze Squat
exercises.movement: Place the ball between your knees, toes pointing straight ahead. Squeezing the ball the whole time, sit down into a squat and stand back up, keeping constant pressure on the ball.
cues: "Squeeze the ball the entire rep — don't let off at the top"
"Chest tall, weight through the heels"
"Knees press in on the ball, not out"
"Control down, drive up"

modifications.text: Reduce squat depth while keeping the squeeze.
Add a pause at the bottom or hold a DB at the chest.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: TRX Hinge to Overhead
exercises.movement: Facing the anchor, hold a TRX handle in each hand with tension on the straps. Hinge at the hips with a flat back, then drive the hips forward to stand tall, finishing with the arms reaching overhead. Lower back to the hinge with control.
cues: "Hinge from the hips — push them back, soft knees"
"Flat back the whole way down"
"Snap the hips through and reach tall overhead"
"Let the straps support you — stay in control, don't yank"

modifications.text: Reduce range — hinge to a comfortable depth and reach to shoulder height.
Slow the tempo and pause at full overhead reach.
Keep the hinge shallow and the back flat throughout.

exercises.name: Explosive Bench Press Up
exercises.movement: Stand at the side of the FitBench. Fall toward the bench, hands catching your body, and take your chest to the bench top. Explode as you press up and away from the bench back to standing. Repeat.
cues: "Catch yourself with soft elbows — absorb, don't crash"
"Chest all the way to the bench top"
"Explode off — push the bench away from you"
"Body stays in one line — no sagging hips"

modifications.text: Press up without the explosive push-off — keep hands on the bench.
Add a clap or press from a lower surface.
Catch on fists or reduce the fall distance.

exercises.name: KB Deadlift 2arm
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, one KB held with both hands between the legs, knees soft. Back straight, reach your butt to the rear wall as deep as comfortable. Stand up and squeeze the glutes at the top. Repeat.
cues: "Push the hips back — the bell just comes along"
"Flat back, chest proud the whole way"
"Stand tall and squeeze the glutes at the top"
"Keep the bell close — it should graze the legs"

modifications.text: Elevate the KB on a riser to shorten the range.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom or slow the lower.
Reduce depth and keep the back flat — never round to reach the floor.

exercises.name: TRX 3 Way Row
exercises.movement: Arms extended, feet under the anchor. Palms down, pull the handles to the shoulders and return. Thumbs up, pull to the armpits and return. Palms up, pull to the ribs. Repeat the cycle.
cues: "Three rows, three targets — shoulders, armpits, ribs"
"Body is a plank — move from the arms, not the hips"
"Squeeze the blades together on every pull"
"Lower with control — don't drop into the straps"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to stand more upright.
Walk the feet forward under the anchor or elevate them.
Stay in the mid-row angle and skip the high pull.

exercises.name: Ball Reverse Lunge w/ rotation alt.
exercises.movement: Hold the ball at your chest, hands stacked. Step back with one foot into a reverse lunge and rotate the shoulders toward the front-leg side, then back to center. Stand and repeat on the other side, rotating opposite the stepping leg.
cues: "Rotate over the front leg — chest stays tall"
"Back knee drops straight down, not forward"
"Move from the ribs — hips stay square"
"Drive through the front heel to stand"

modifications.text: Shrink the rotation or lunge without the ball.
Slow the rotation and pause at the end range.
Shorten the lunge and limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: DB RDL
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, a DB in each hand in front of the thighs, knees soft. Back straight, reach your butt to the rear wall as deep as comfortable, then stand tall.
cues: "Hips back, not down — this is a hinge, not a squat"
"Slide the DBs down the thighs — keep them close"
"Flat back — proud chest at every depth"
"Squeeze the glutes to stand, don't pull with the back"

modifications.text: Reduce depth — stop where the back stays flat.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds or pause at the bottom.
Shorten the range and lighten the load.

exercises.name: DB Chest Press and Chest Fly alt.
exercises.movement: Lying on the bench, complete a chest press, then a fly, then back to a press — alternating the two movements in one combo.
cues: "Press straight up — fly wide with soft elbows"
"On the fly, hug a big tree — don't drop the arms too low"
"Ribs down, low back gently on the bench"
"Same control on both — the fly is not a rest"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs — the fly is the limiter, size the weight to it.
Slow both lowers to 3 seconds.
Shorten the fly range — keep the elbows above chest level.

exercises.name: DB Goblet Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.movement: Holding a DB in the goblet position, place one foot on the bench top behind you. Torso tall, drop into a lunge keeping the back knee under the hip, then drive through the front heel to stand.
cues: "Front foot far enough out — knee tracks over the ankle"
"Drop straight down — back knee under your hip"
"Chest tall — don't fold over the bell"
"Front heel does the work — push the floor away"

modifications.text: Use bodyweight only, or rear foot on a lower surface.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom of each rep.
Limit depth to a pain-free range and shorten the stance.

exercises.name: Ball Squat
exercises.movement: Holding the med ball in front of your body, sit the hips down until the thighs are parallel with the ground. Stand tall and repeat.
cues: "Sit the hips down and back — chest stays tall"
"Thighs to parallel — full depth every rep"
"Drive through the heels to stand"
"Ball stays tight to the chest — don't let it drift"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or squat to a bench target.
Add a pause at parallel or press the ball overhead as you stand.
Limit depth to a pain-free range, toes slightly out.

exercises.name: TRX Inverted Row
exercises.movement: Hang under the straps, knees bent, feet on the ground, palms facing each other. Pull your hands to your chest, then return to fully extended arms with control. Repeat.
cues: "Body is a plank — hips stay up the whole set"
"Pull the chest to the hands, not the chin"
"Squeeze the blades together at the top"
"Full extension at the bottom — earn every rep"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back and stand more upright.
Straighten the legs or elevate the feet.
Reduce the range — pull to a comfortable depth only.

exercises.name: Ball Woodchop
exercises.movement: Hold the ball over one shoulder with arms straight. Lower it across the body to the opposite hip, as though swinging an axe to chop wood. Return overhead and repeat, then switch sides.
cues: "Chop on a diagonal — shoulder to opposite hip"
"Rotate from the ribs and hips, arms stay long"
"Control the swing both directions — don't let it whip you"
"Pivot the back foot as you chop through"

modifications.text: Shorten the arc — chest to hip instead of overhead.
Add a squat as the ball travels down.
Slow the tempo and shrink the rotation range.

exercises.name: DB Split Squat
exercises.movement: Split stance, DBs at the sides or shoulders. Drop the back knee almost to the ground, torso tall, then drive through the front heel to stand. Switch feet at the halfway point.
cues: "Drop straight down — like an elevator, not an escalator"
"Front knee tracks over the toes"
"Chest tall — no leaning into the front leg"
"Push the floor away through the front heel"

modifications.text: Use bodyweight only or reduce depth.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom, or front-rack the DBs.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: Fitband Hip Thrust
exercises.movement: Fitband connected low on the bench and across the hips, upper back on the bench, legs bent. Drive the heels into the ground and squeeze the glutes to lift the hips as high as possible. Lower with control.
cues: "Drive through the heels — toes can even lift"
"Squeeze the glutes hard at the top — full lockout"
"Ribs down — don't arch the low back to finish"
"Chin tucked, eyes forward over your knees"

modifications.text: Remove the band and thrust bodyweight only.
Pause 2-3 seconds at the top of each rep.
Reduce the range — lift to a height with no back arch.

exercises.name: DB Push Press
exercises.movement: Hold the DBs in the front rack position. Dip and drive with the legs, using the momentum to help press the DBs toward the ceiling to lockout. Bend the knees as you bring the weights back to the rack.
cues: "Short dip, big drive — the legs start the press"
"Punch straight up — finish with biceps by the ears"
"Heels stay down on the dip"
"Absorb the catch — soft knees on the way down"

modifications.text: Strict press lighter DBs without the leg drive.
Pause overhead, or slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Press to a comfortable height instead of full lockout.

exercises.name: V-Ups on Bench
exercises.movement: Lie on your back, arms straight overhead, legs extended. Sit up and lift the legs, touching hands to shins, knees, or toes. Slowly lower back down.
cues: "Fold in half — hands and feet meet in the middle"
"Reach tall, not just forward"
"Slow lower — that's the half that builds the core"
"Keep the legs as straight as you can manage"

modifications.text: Bend the knees — touch hands to shins in a tuck-up.
Hold a light DB or slow the tempo.
Do single-leg V-ups, keeping one foot down.

exercises.name: KB Sumo Squat
exercises.movement: Feet wide, toes pointed slightly out, KB held between the legs. Sink the hips down and back, then stand and repeat.
cues: "Knees track out over the toes — push them wide"
"Sit straight down between the heels"
"Chest proud — the bell hangs, you don't lean"
"Squeeze the glutes at the top"

modifications.text: Use bodyweight or reduce depth.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom or add a heavier bell.
Limit depth and keep the knees tracking over the toes.

exercises.name: TRX Elbow Body Saw
exercises.movement: Low plank on the elbows with feet in the stirrups. Keeping the body parallel to the floor, push your body 6–8 inches slowly forward and then back. Continue the motion.
cues: "Small saw — 6 to 8 inches, no more"
"Brace before you move — ribs to hips"
"Hips level — no sag, no pike"
"Slow both directions — control is the rep"

modifications.text: Hold a static TRX plank without the saw.
Lengthen the saw or slow the tempo further.
Do the saw from a floor plank with feet down.

exercises.name: Alt. Arm KB Swing
exercises.movement: KB on the floor in front of you, feet shoulder-width. Slide the hips back, grab the handle with one hand, and hike it between the legs. Drive the hips forward and stand tall — as the bell floats, switch hands, then drive it back between the legs.
cues: "Switch at the float — the bell is weightless up top"
"It's a hinge, not a squat — hips back, then snap"
"Free arm sweeps back like a skier"
"Shoulders square — don't let the bell twist you"

modifications.text: Two-hand swings — skip the switch.
Heavier bell, or switch every other swing.
Lighten the bell and shorten the backswing.

exercises.name: TRX Single Arm Row
exercises.movement: Hold one handle in one hand with the arm straight, feet hip-width. Pull the hand to the armpit while staying square to the anchor, then lower to the start.
cues: "Stay square — fight the twist the whole pull"
"Pull the elbow straight back, not out wide"
"Plank from heels to head"
"Lower slow — don't unwind at the bottom"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to stand more upright.
Walk the feet forward, or pause at the top of each row.
Reduce range and keep the elbow path comfortable.

exercises.name: Push Up to T Stand
exercises.movement: Complete a push up, then rotate to one side, making a 'T' with the body — arm reaching all the way to the sky, stacked over the other shoulder. Return to the push up and repeat on the other side.
cues: "Push the floor away, then open to the sky"
"Stack the wrists — bottom hand under the top one"
"Hips stay high in the T — one straight line"
"Follow your thumb with your eyes"

modifications.text: Push up from the knees, then rotate from a tall plank.
Hold the T position 2-3 seconds each side.
Rotate from the forearm instead of an extended arm.

exercises.name: Sprinter Abs on Bench
exercises.movement: Sit on the bench with the upper body at a 45° angle. Bring the right knee toward the chest while pumping the left arm toward the knee, then alternate sides like you're sprinting. Don't let the feet touch the ground or the body fall back.
cues: "Run in place — opposite knee, opposite arm"
"Stay at 45 — don't sit up tall or fall back"
"Feet never touch down"
"Quick arms — they set the pace"

modifications.text: Tap the heels down between reps, or slow the pace.
Lean further back or speed up the cadence.
Sit taller and shrink the range.

exercises.name: Around the world lunge
exercises.movement: Front lunge, side lunge, back lunge — all on the same leg — then switch legs and repeat. Load with DBs if needed.
cues: "Three lunges, one leg — front, side, back"
"Reset tall between each direction"
"On the side lunge, sit into the hip — other leg long"
"Same depth in every direction — no shortcuts on the back lunge"

modifications.text: Shorten each step and stay bodyweight.
Hold DBs at the sides or goblet position.
Limit depth and skip the direction that aggravates.

exercises.name: SL Ball Slam alt.
exercises.movement: Standing on the right foot with the left foot off the ground, take the med ball overhead and slam it down. Hinge at the hips to pick it up, keeping the left foot off the ground and your balance. Switch legs.
cues: "Stick the balance — the floor leg never wavers"
"Slam from the hips, not just the arms"
"Hinge flat-backed to pick it up"
"Slow is fine — balance beats speed here"

modifications.text: Tap the free toe down for balance, or slam two-footed.
Heavier ball or eyes-up the entire set.
Lighten the ball and shrink the slam arc.

exercises.name: TRX Row to Bicep Curl
exercises.movement: Complete a TRX row, then a TRX bicep curl, alternating the two movements.
cues: "Row pulls to the ribs — curl pulls to the forehead"
"Elbows stay high on the curl"
"Plank body on both — hips never break"
"Two different pulls — don't blur them together"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to stand more upright.
Walk the feet forward under the anchor.
Keep the row only and skip the curl if the angle bothers.

exercises.name: DB SL Hip Thrust on Bench
exercises.movement: Upper back on the bench, legs bent. Drive one heel into the ground and squeeze the glutes to lift the hips as high as possible on one leg. Lower with control, then switch legs.
cues: "One heel drives — the other leg is just a passenger"
"Squeeze at the top — full hip lockout"
"Hips stay level — don't let the free side drop"
"Ribs down, chin tucked"

modifications.text: Two-leg hip thrust, or keep the free foot lightly down.
Add a DB across the hips or pause at the top.
Reduce the range — no arch at the top.

exercises.name: DB Shoulder Press
exercises.movement: Hold the DBs at or in front of the shoulders. Legs locked, core braced. Press the DBs toward the ceiling, return to the start, and repeat.
cues: "Press straight up — finish with biceps by the ears"
"Squeeze the glutes — no leaning back"
"Ribs down — brace before every press"
"Lower with control to the shoulders, not past them"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs or press seated with back support.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds, or press one arm at a time.
Press in a neutral grip to a comfortable height.

exercises.name: Alt. Lying Leg Raise
exercises.movement: Lying flat, hands under the glutes if needed. Start with both legs straight up. Lower one leg at a time with control until just before it taps the ground, raise it back up, and alternate.
cues: "Low back glued down — that's the whole game"
"One leg works, the other holds tall"
"Lower slow — hover, don't touch"
"Keep both legs long"

modifications.text: Bend the moving knee to shorten the lever.
Lower both legs together, or add a pause at the bottom.
Shrink the range — keep the legs higher.

exercises.name: KB T-Rex Swing
exercises.movement: KB on the floor slightly in front of you, feet shoulder-width. Slide the hips back, grab the handle, and hike it between the legs. Drive the hips forward and stand tall, bending at the elbows to let the bell float to chest height, then drive it back between the legs.
cues: "Hips snap, elbows bend — bell floats to the chest"
"It's still a hinge — don't squat the swing"
"Keep the bell close on the pull"
"Flat back on every hike"

modifications.text: Standard two-hand swing without the elbow pull.
Heavier bell — keep the float at chest height.
Lighten the bell and shorten the backswing.

exercises.name: DB Overhead Triceps Extension 1arm
exercises.movement: DB in one hand, arm stretched straight overhead. Bend at the elbow, taking the DB behind the head to the base of the neck. Extend the arm straight overhead again and repeat, then switch sides.
cues: "Elbow points to the ceiling — keep it tight to your head"
"Only the forearm moves"
"Full lockout at the top, full stretch at the bottom"
"Ribs down — don't arch to finish the press"

modifications.text: Use both hands on one DB.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Do a lying skull crusher instead of overhead.

exercises.name: DB Upright Row
exercises.movement: Starting with the DBs in front of the thighs, pull the elbows up and back to shoulder height, then return.
cues: "Elbows lead — they finish above the wrists"
"Pull up the body line — bells stay close"
"Stop at shoulder height — no higher"
"Lower slow — same path down"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs and shorten the pull.
Pause 1-2 seconds at the top.
Pull only to chest height with a wider hand path.

exercises.name: DB Preacher Curl 1 Arm
exercises.movement: Bench set to incline. Standing behind it, place your armpit against the bench top with the DB in hand and the arm lying on the pad. Curl the DB toward the shoulder, keeping the elbow against the bench, release down, and repeat. Switch sides.
cues: "Pin the elbow to the pad — it never moves"
"Curl all the way up, lower all the way down"
"Slow on the way down — no dropping"
"Keep the wrist straight — don't let it curl for you"

modifications.text: Lighten the DB and shorten the bottom range.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds or pause halfway down.
Reduce the range at the bottom — keep a soft bend.

exercises.name: KB Wave Squat
exercises.movement: Holding the KB in the goblet position, complete a squat, finishing with a calf raise at the top of the movement.
cues: "Squat, stand, then rise to the toes — one wave"
"Full squat first — don't shortchange it for the calf raise"
"Balance tall at the top of the raise"
"Heels down soft before the next rep"

modifications.text: Skip the calf raise or go bodyweight.
Pause at the top of the calf raise.
Limit squat depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: KB Side Step Swing
exercises.movement: Perform a KB swing while taking a lateral step between swings, alternating sides right to left.
cues: "Step on the float — move while the bell is weightless"
"Hips drive the swing — same snap every rep"
"Land hip-width before the next hike"
"Eyes forward, flat back on every backswing"

modifications.text: Swing in place — add steps only when ready.
Bigger steps or a heavier bell.
Lighten the bell and shorten the backswing.

exercises.name: Ball Frog Jump
exercises.movement: Hands on the ball in a plank position. Jump the feet up as close to the sides of the ball as you can, then jump back to plank.
cues: "Jump the feet to the ball — knees outside the elbows"
"Hips high on the jump in"
"Grip the ball — strong shoulders the whole time"
"Land light — quiet feet"

modifications.text: Step the feet in one at a time instead of jumping.
Speed up the cycle or add a push up on the ball.
Do the movement from the floor instead of the ball.

exercises.name: DB Bird Dog Row
exercises.movement: DB in the right hand, left hand and right knee on the bench, left leg extended. Pull the DB to the ribs, lower, and repeat — keeping a straight line from ankle to ear. Switch sides.
cues: "One line, ankle to ear — don't let the hips sag"
"Row to the ribs, elbow tight"
"The extended leg stays squeezed and still"
"Slow lower — balance is half the exercise"

modifications.text: Keep both knees on the bench — row without the leg extended.
Pause 2 seconds at the top of each row.
Keep the supporting base wide and the range short.

exercises.name: DB Sumo Deadlift 2arm
exercises.movement: Feet wider than the shoulders, toes out. Sit the hips back with a flat back and pick up the DBs by squeezing the glutes to stand tall. Send the hips back to return.
cues: "Knees out over the toes as you sit back"
"Chest proud — flat back start to finish"
"Stand by squeezing the glutes, not yanking the back"
"Bells travel straight up and down between the legs"

modifications.text: Elevate the DBs on a riser to shorten the range.
Pause at the bottom or slow the lower.
Reduce depth and keep the load light.

exercises.name: DB Bent over Triceps Kickback
exercises.movement: Holding DBs in each hand, hinge back at the hips. Extend the elbows as the weights move toward the hips, then return to the start and repeat.
cues: "Pin the elbows high — only the forearms move"
"Squeeze at full extension — straight arm, hard stop"
"Hold the hinge — flat back the whole set"
"Light weight, perfect reps"

modifications.text: One arm at a time with a hand braced on the thigh.
Pause 2 seconds at full extension.
Stand taller in the hinge or brace the chest on an incline bench.

exercises.name: KB Dual Front Rack Squat
exercises.movement: Holding KBs in the front rack position, elbows tucked to the ribs on each side, complete a squat to at least parallel.
cues: "Elbows stay tucked — the rack doesn't move"
"Sit between the heels — at least parallel"
"Stay tall against the bells — they want to fold you"
"Big breath at the top, brace down and up"

modifications.text: Use one bell in the goblet position.
Pause at the bottom of each squat.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: TRX High Row
exercises.movement: Start with the arms extended and feet under the anchor, palms down. Pull the handles to the shoulders and return.
cues: "Pull high — handles to the shoulders, elbows wide"
"Squeeze the rear delts and upper back at the top"
"Plank body — move as one piece"
"Control the return — full extension every rep"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to stand more upright.
Walk the feet forward under the anchor.
Lower the pull to mid-row height.

exercises.name: Ball Clean to Press
exercises.movement: Feet shoulder-width with the med ball in the middle. Sit the hips back, grab the ball, then drive the feet into the floor and thrust the hips forward, bringing the ball to the chest. Press it to the ceiling, return it to the floor, and repeat.
cues: "Hips do the clean — the arms just guide it"
"Stand all the way up before you press"
"Press straight overhead — finish tall"
"Flat back every time you reach for the floor"

modifications.text: Clean to the chest only — skip the press.
Heavier ball or add a squat before the press.
Press to eye level instead of full overhead.

exercises.name: Ball Half Push up
exercises.movement: In a high plank with the med ball under the chest, complete a half push up, touching the chest to the ball, then press back to the top and repeat.
cues: "Chest taps the ball — same depth every rep"
"Elbows about 45 degrees — not flared wide"
"One straight line — squeeze the glutes"
"Push the floor away hard at the top"

modifications.text: Drop to the knees and keep the same chest-to-ball depth.
Slow the lower, or take a full-range push up with hands on the ball.
Turn the hands out slightly or use fists.

exercises.name: Alt. Lunge Off Bench (ea)
exercises.movement: Stand tall on the box. Step off the side with one leg to the floor, then use the foot on the box to pull yourself back up. Repeat, alternating sides.
cues: "The leg on the box does the work — pull, don't push off the floor"
"Lower under control — don't fall to the floor"
"Chest tall on the way down and up"
"Full foot on the box at all times"

modifications.text: Use a lower box or assist with a light push from the floor leg.
Hold DBs at the sides or slow the descent.
Reduce the box height and keep depth pain-free.

exercises.name: DB Front Loaded Good Morning
exercises.movement: Hold the DB against the chest, feet hip-width. Bend at the hips, then pull the hips through to stand. Drive the hips back to the start and repeat.
cues: "Hips back first — the chest follows"
"Flat back — proud chest at the bottom"
"Hug the bell tight to the chest"
"Squeeze the glutes through to stand tall"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or go bodyweight with hands at the chest.
Slow the descent to 3 seconds.
Shorten the hinge and keep the load light.

exercises.name: TRX Mid Row Underhand Grip
exercises.movement: Start with the arms extended, feet under the anchor, underhand grip with thumbs up. Pull the handles to the armpits, return, and repeat.
cues: "Palms up — pull to the armpits"
"Elbows graze the ribs on the way back"
"Squeeze the blades — don't just bend the arms"
"Long arms at the bottom of every rep"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to stand more upright.
Walk the feet forward or pause at the top.
Switch to a neutral grip.

exercises.name: KB Farmer Carry Knee Raise in Place
exercises.movement: Standing with feet under the hips and a KB in each hand at the sides, core engaged, lift one knee at a time to hip height in place. Stay controlled, return the foot to the ground, and repeat on the other side.
cues: "Stand tall — the bells don't get to tip you"
"Knee to hip height — slow and deliberate"
"Shoulders back and down, grip strong"
"Brace like someone's about to poke your ribs"

modifications.text: One bell only, or lower the knee height.
Pause 2 seconds at the top of each raise.
Lightly touch a rack or wall with one hand.

exercises.name: DB SL Deadlift Alt.
exercises.movement: Stand on the right leg holding one DB with both hands. Reach the left heel to the rear wall, keeping a straight line from ankle to ear. Squeeze the right glute to stand, then switch legs.
cues: "Reach the heel back, not down"
"One line — ankle to ear"
"Hips square to the floor the whole way"
"Squeeze the standing glute to come up"

modifications.text: Kickstand stance — back toe lightly down.
Slow the lower or add load.
Hold a rack or wall with the free hand.

exercises.name: Band Squats
exercises.movement: Place the Fitband just above the knees and hook the carabiners together. Press the knees out to keep tension on the band, squat down, then stand back up quickly.
cues: "Push the band apart the entire rep"
"Knees out — never let the band win"
"Sit back and down, chest tall"
"Snap up quick — fast on the way up"

modifications.text: Reduce depth — keep the band tension.
Add a pause at the bottom while pressing out.
Limit depth to a pain-free range — the band actually helps tracking.

exercises.name: DB Arnold Press
exercises.movement: Start with palms facing the shoulders. Rotate the palms to face forward as the weights press to full extension overhead. Lower and rotate back to the start. Repeat.
cues: "Rotate as you rise — palms turn through the press"
"Finish with biceps by the ears"
"Reverse the spiral on the way down"
"Ribs down — no arching to lock out"

modifications.text: Lighten the DBs or press without the rotation.
Slow the full rotation both directions.
Press in a neutral grip without the rotation.

exercises.name: TRX I-Y-T
exercises.movement: Start with arms extended and feet under the anchor. Keeping the arms straight, pull to an I position and return, pull to a Y position and return, pull to a T position. Repeat the sequence.
cues: "Straight arms — these are raises, not rows"
"I overhead, Y diagonal, T out wide"
"Squeeze the blades on every letter"
"Body stays a plank — no hip hinge to cheat"

modifications.text: Walk the feet back to reduce the angle.
Walk the feet forward — small angle changes are big here.
Keep the T only and skip the overhead I.

exercises.name: KB Row in Gorilla Alt.
exercises.movement: Wide stance, hips back, back straight, one arm hanging straight with the KB in the other hand. Row the KB to the ribs, return slowly, and repeat on the opposite side.
cues: "Hold the hinge — the torso doesn't bob"
"Row to the ribs, elbow past the back"
"Shoulders square — don't twist to lift"
"Slow return, quiet bell"

modifications.text: Stagger one hand on a bench for support.
Pause at the top of each row.
Raise the bells onto a riser to reduce the hinge depth.

exercises.name: TRX Rollout
exercises.movement: Hold the TRX handles in front at chest level with straight arms and a slight forward lean. Tighten the abs and let the hands reach forward and up as deep as comfortable, then pull back to chest level.
cues: "Brace first — ribs to hips before you lean"
"Arms long — reach up and away"
"Hips locked — don't break at the waist"
"Only as deep as you can control back"

modifications.text: Step the feet back and shrink the rollout range.
Step the feet forward for a deeper angle.
Keep the range short — stop before any arch.

exercises.name: DB Crossbody Curtsy Lunge 1arm
exercises.movement: DB in one hand. Step the same-side leg back into a curtsy lunge while rotating at the waist to take the DB toward the top of the front foot. Stand, repeat, and alternate sides.
cues: "Step behind and across — curtsy, not a straight lunge"
"Reach the bell over the front foot as you sink"
"Front knee stays tracking over the toes"
"Stand tall and re-set between reps"

modifications.text: Skip the reach — hold the DB at the chest.
Slow the descent and pause at the bottom.
Shorten the curtsy step and limit depth.

exercises.name: DB 2 arm Row in Lunge
exercises.movement: Step back into a lunge position with a soft bend in the front leg and the back leg straight, leaning slightly forward. Extend the DBs toward the floor, then pull them to the hips and lower back down.
cues: "Hold the lunge — the lower body is frozen"
"Row both bells to the hips, elbows tight"
"Flat back — chest just above the front thigh"
"Long arms at the bottom of every rep"

modifications.text: Rest the free hand on the front thigh and row one arm at a time.
Pause at the top of each row.
Stand taller in the lean and lighten the bells.

exercises.name: Ball Racked Split Squat
exercises.movement: Holding the med ball on one shoulder, take a split stance and drop the back knee almost to the ground, torso tall. Drive through the front heel to stand. Switch feet at the halfway point.
cues: "Ball on the shoulder — stay tall against it"
"Drop straight down, back knee under the hip"
"Don't lean toward the ball side"
"Front heel drives the floor away"

modifications.text: Hold the ball at the chest with both hands.
Pause at the bottom of each rep.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: KB Shoulder to Shoulder Press
exercises.movement: Feet shoulder-width, KB held in front of the right shoulder with elbows pointing down. Press the KB up and over your head, then bend the elbows and slowly lower it to the left shoulder. Keep alternating shoulders.
cues: "Press up and over — draw a rainbow with the bell"
"Slow lower to the other shoulder — that's the work"
"Ribs down, glutes tight — no leaning side to side"
"Catch soft — bell lands gently every time"

modifications.text: Lighten the bell or press straight up without the travel.
Pause overhead at the top of each arc.
Press to eye level and shrink the arc.

exercises.name: Plank w/ knee to both elbows
exercises.movement: In a plank position, lift and reach the left knee to the right elbow, extend, then reach it to the left elbow. Repeat with the right leg.
cues: "Across first, then same side — two taps per leg"
"Hips stay low and level — don't pike to reach"
"Move slow — let the core do it, not momentum"
"Push the floor away the whole time"

modifications.text: One touch per leg — knee to same-side elbow only.
Pause 2 seconds at each elbow.
Drop to a forearm plank.

exercises.name: DB Deadlift
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, a DB in each hand held in front of the thighs, knees soft. Back straight, reach your butt to the rear wall as deep as comfortable, then stand tall.
cues: "Hips back — the bells just ride the legs down"
"Flat back, proud chest"
"Push the floor away to stand"
"Squeeze the glutes at the top — don't lean back"

modifications.text: Reduce depth — stop where the back stays flat.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Shorten the range and lighten the load.

exercises.name: Box Jump
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width apart. Squat back like you're sitting in a chair, then explode up to jump onto the bench. Step down and repeat.
cues: "Load the hips, swing the arms — explode up"
"Land soft in a quarter squat — quiet feet"
"Full foot on the box every time"
"Step down, never jump down"

modifications.text: Step up instead of jumping, or use a lower target.
Add height or pause briefly between reps to reset power.
Replace with step ups — no jumping.

exercises.name: KB Goblet Squat
exercises.movement: Feet hip-width, single KB held in front of the chest. Sit back, chest tall, as deep as possible. Stand squeezing the glutes, repeat.
cues: "Elbows inside the knees — push them out"
"Sit into it — chest tall the whole way down"
"Drive through the heels, squeeze at the top"
"Own the bottom — don't bounce out of it"

modifications.text: Reduce depth or go bodyweight.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom.
Limit depth to a pain-free range, toes slightly out.

exercises.name: KB Tactical Lunge
exercises.movement: Holding the KB at your side, complete a reverse lunge with the opposite foot and pass the KB underneath the front leg at the bottom. Step forward and repeat on the opposite side.
cues: "Pass the bell under the front thigh at the bottom"
"Stay tall — don't dive down to make the pass"
"Back knee hovers, doesn't slam"
"Smooth handoff — the bell never rests"

modifications.text: Lunge without the pass, holding the bell at the chest.
Slow the descent and pause for the pass.
Limit depth and shorten the step.

exercises.name: DB Offset Weight Bulgarian Split Squat
exercises.movement: DB held in the front rack on one side, with the same-side leg up on the bench behind you. Keep the torso upright and complete a Bulgarian split squat, stand, and repeat. Complete on the other side too.
cues: "Weight on the back-leg side — fight the pull sideways"
"Drop straight down, torso tall"
"Front heel does the work"
"Brace the free side — that's where the core kicks in"

modifications.text: Hold the DB at the chest with both hands or go bodyweight.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom.
Limit depth to a pain-free range.

exercises.name: DB 1 Arm Crossbody RDL
exercises.movement: DB in one hand, standing tall with feet under the hips. Hinge at the hips into an RDL while rotating to take the DB over the opposite foot at the bottom. Stand and return to the top.
cues: "Hinge first, then reach across"
"Flat back even as you rotate"
"The bell tracks to the opposite foot — slow and smooth"
"Squeeze the glutes to stand and unwind"

modifications.text: Reduce depth — reach to the opposite knee instead.
Slow the lower to 3 seconds.
Shrink the rotation and keep the hinge shallow.

exercises.name: DB Squeeze Press
exercises.movement: Lie flat on the bench, a DB in each hand, the bells touching directly over the chest. Keep them squeezed together as you lower over the chest, elbows grazing past the ribs, then press back up. Repeat.
cues: "Crush the bells together — never let the squeeze go"
"Elbows graze the ribs on the way down"
"Press and squeeze at the same time"
"Slow lower — feel the chest the whole rep"

modifications.text: Lighten the bells — the squeeze is the work.
Pause 2 seconds at the bottom while squeezing.
Shorten the lower — keep the elbows above the bench line.

exercises.name: Ball Ground to Overhead
exercises.movement: From a squat position, pick up the med ball and press it overhead at the top of the squat. Return to the bottom position and repeat.
cues: "Floor to ceiling — one continuous rep"
"Stand tall before the ball goes overhead"
"Flat back every time you reach down"
"Punch the ball to the sky — full finish"

modifications.text: Lift to chest height instead of overhead.
Heavier ball or add a jump as you press.
Press to eye level only.

exercises.name: BW Reverse Lunge w/ Reach Alt.
exercises.movement: Step back into a reverse lunge and reach up with both arms to stretch the hips and shoulders. Alternate sides.
cues: "Reach tall — open the hips and the ribs together"
"Back knee drops straight down"
